name: Shop & Monetization
description: Shop V.9: tabbed catalog, PayPal/MN2 rails, inventory shadow merge, API line checks, og monetization flows. Inkluderer månedlige tema-SKUer (theme-january … theme-december) og wave v6/v7 tags.
agent_prompt: Shop V.9: tabs Catalog / PayPal & coins / MN2 / Boosters / Inventory. Wave v6: D&D (merged D6D), MTG tribute, Mafia, AI Core, Christmas, Home Base. Wave v7: 12 monthly_theme SKUer (theme-january … theme-december). MN2 5-dags monitor (mn2-5d-*). Shadow shop_v9_shadow_{user}. shop-v9-purchase + shop-v4-purchase. API line checks GET /api/shop/config. Lab: same game_user_id; handbook docs/LAB.md; APIs /api/lab/progression, explore, chapter2-research, technologies.
tech_spec: SHOP_UI_VERSION=9.0.0 (shop_routes); shop/index.html ShopV9; GET /api/shop/config (shop_ui_version, api_line_checks); POST /api/shop-v3/purchase, /api/game/shop/purchase; GET /api/shop/inventory; GET /api/shop/purchases; data/shop_v4_api_line_checks.json (filnavn historisk, indhold = produktlinje); profile merge shadow v9+v4. Lab: GET /api/lab/progression; POST /api/lab/explore; GET|POST /api/lab/chapter2-research; GET|POST /api/lab/technologies; POST /api/lab/technologies/{id}/agent-refine — se docs/LAB.md.
user_guide: Åbn /shop. Vælg faner og kategori-filter. Køb med coins, unified points, MN2 eller PayPal (coin packs / subscription på PayPal-fanen). Profile viser inventory med samme merge som shop. Kør API line test i bunden af revenue-kortet hvis noget fejler. Tværgående tema-/MN2-dokumentation: se cross_rulebook_routing (V1,V4,V5,V6,V7,V8,V10,lab_research). Research og exploration: /lab + handbook docs/LAB.md (repo).
manual: Agent manual V9: Henvis til shop UI; ingen server-køb fra agent uden tool. Brug monthly_theme_catalog for måned-for-måned SKU-liste. Forklar V6.1–V6.8 shop_rulebook_patches for kategori→regel. Dokumentér shop_ui_version når bruger spørger om version. Lab: cross_rulebook_routing.lab_research + rules.lab_handbook; fuld teknisk reference i docs/LAB.md.

tabs.label: MN2 wallet
tabs.notes: Balance, in-wallet betaling, on-chain ordre + QR.

monthly_theme_catalog.name: January Aurora
monthly_theme_catalog.summary: Arctic glow / new-year crisp UI energy.

monthly_theme_catalog.name: March Clover Rain
monthly_theme_catalog.summary: Clover greens / early spring rain contrast.

cross_rulebook_routing.purpose: Hvor shop-/tema-/MN2-dokumentation hører hjemme på tværs af V1–V10 — undgå drift: V9 holder kanoniske SKU-lister; øvrige bind lægger domæne-regler ovenpå.
cross_rulebook_routing.canonical_sku_lists: Denne fil (V9): monthly_theme_catalog; wave v6-temaer + wave v7 månedlige theme-*; mn2-5d-* monitor-linje; Hunters shop-linjer i rules.shop_items / hunters_shop.
cross_rulebook_routing.v1_core: Profil-identitet, fair-use for tredjeparts-temaer, MN2 5-dags overflade vs on-chain; peger tilbage til V9 for fuld katalog.
cross_rulebook_routing.v4_star_map: Stjernedata uændret af UI-temaer; månedlige temaer er kosmetik ift. star map API.
cross_rulebook_routing.v5_effect_clusters: monthly_cluster_hints + cluster-sprog til Mafia/AI/jul + måneder (forklaring til spillere, ikke nye spells).
cross_rulebook_routing.v6_electric_magnet: Shop kategori ↔ specials bridge (shop_rulebook_patches V6.1–V6.8); wave v6/v7 temaer ændrer ikke Electric Magnet-special scope.
cross_rulebook_routing.v7_unified_points: MN2 vs unified points; theme-/måned-køb giver ikke point medmindre eksplicit add_points-kobling findes.
cross_rulebook_routing.v8_agents: Agent adfærd når brugeren spørger om shop/SKU: tool-grounded, wallet-sandhed, henvis til V9 for lister.
cross_rulebook_routing.v10_battle: Battle/leaderboard/profiling uændret af shop-temaer alene; kosmetik erstatter ikke profiling-endpoints.
cross_rulebook_routing.lab_research: Lab (/lab): research grid, exploration pulse og co-tech deler game_user_id med shop og profile; første research-touch kan give unified points + hunter XP (server). Katalog data/lab_progression_catalog.json. Operativ handbook: docs/LAB.md. APIs under /api/lab/*.

rules.name: Shop Items
rules.text: Electric Magnet, Star Map, Lab, Verification, DNA, Rulebook, Communication Psychology packs.

rules.name: Hunters Shop
rules.text: Trophies (Winter Wedding, Medieval Crown, Time Reversal, Power Combo, Jarl's Favor). Stories: Winter Wedding Story Unlock, Medieval Campaign Pack. Game time: +30m, +1h, +2h, +4h, Weekend Pass. Boosters: XP, Power Combo 1h, Time Reversal 1h, Medieval Might 1h.

rules.name: Purchases
rules.text: Shop purchase flow. Inventory opdateres ved køb; shadow backup i browser for offline/preflight merge.

rules.name: Monetization
rules.text: Monetization flows integreret med unified points og profile.

rules.name: Version canon
rules.text: UI- og config-version er V.9 (9.0.0). Tidligere 4.0.0 / ShopV4 navne i repo henviser til samme produktlinje — se RULEBOOK_CANON.md.

rules.name: API line checks
rules.text: Run checks knappen kalder samme endpoints som scripts/shop_v4_production_smoke.py --full-line (JSON-kilde data/shop_v4_api_line_checks.json).

rules.name: Profile parity
rules.text: Profile inventory læser API + shop_v9_shadow + shop_v4_shadow og lytter på shop-v9-purchase / shop-v4-purchase / storage events.

rules.name: Nye temaer (wave v6)
rules.text: Katalog indeholder blandt andet ét D&D-tema (tidligere D6D foldet ind), Magic: The Gathering (fan tribute), Mafia noir, AI Core, Christmas, Home Base — category themes, tags shop_wave_v6. Legacy item_id theme-d6d i inventory mappes stadig i shop_item_media til samme visuelle linje som theme-dnd.

rules.name: MN2 5-dags monitor-SKUer
rules.text: Fem shop-linjer (mn2-5d-*) knytter sig til Profile MN2 5-dags UTC chart (ind/ud søjler). De er primært flair/reminder; saldi styres af MN2 endpoints og wallet.

rules.name: Sæson og hjem
rules.text: Christmas og Home Base er generiske UI-temaer; marketing-kopi må ikke love fysiske leverancer medmindre backend understøtter det.

rules.name: Betaling og tema
rules.text: Tema påvirker ikke PayPal- eller MN2-sikkerhedsflow; brugeren skal stadig godkende transaktioner i deres wallet eller PayPal.

rules.name: Månedlige temaer (wave v7)
rules.text: Tolv faste tema-SKUer (theme-january … theme-december), category themes, tags monthly_theme + shop_wave_v7 + calendar_theme. Medie-metadata i data/shop_item_media.json. Kosmetik — ingen automatisk kalender-skift i UI uden produktbeslutning.

rules.name: Tværgående rulebook-routing
rules.text: Se cross_rulebook_routing i denne JSON: V1 identitet/MN2-overflade, V4 stjerner vs kosmetik, V5 cluster-hints pr. måned, V6 shop↔specials, V7 points/MN2, V8 agenthjælp, V10 battle-uafhængighed, lab_research Lab↔shop identitet.

rules.name: Lab handbook
rules.text: Live UI /lab; contributor handbook docs/LAB.md (APIs, profile_data keys, catalog, cooldowns, deploy, idé-backlog). Shop SKU-linje Lab i rules.shop_items henviser til samme produkt-univers; progression er catalog-drevet.
